scripts.test: for f in $(find src/__tests__ -name '*.test.ts' | sort); do bun test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.publish: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --build-arg VERSION=$(jq -r .version package.json) -t janbassen1/klaus:$(jq -r .version package.json) -t janbassen1/klaus:latest --push .
